description_long: This lounge set consists of three individual armchairs arranged on a rectangular marble-tiled platform. Each chair features a boxy, modern silhouette with straight lines and a low profile, and is upholstered in a light beige fabric with a subtle, irregular pattern that appears slightly distressed or weathered. The armrests are broad and squared, matching the height of the backrest, which is also straight and unadorned. The legs of the chairs are short, blocky, and appear to be made of a contrasting material, possibly metal or painted wood, with a purplish hue. The marble platform beneath the chairs is laid in a herringbone pattern, providing a sleek and urban context for the furniture. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with a focus on comfort and durability suitable for public or semi-public urban spaces.
description: A set of three modern, boxy armchairs with light beige, patterned upholstery and short, blocky legs, arranged on a marble-tiled platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three armchairs facing forward, highlighting their broad armrests and straight backrests.
description_view_1: Rear view of the central chair and side view of the others, emphasizing the squared back and the short, blocky legs.
description_view_2: Side view of the arrangement, showing the depth of the armchairs and the thickness of the armrests.
description_view_3: Rear angled view, displaying the back and side profiles of the chairs and the marble platform's herringbone pattern.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Each chair has a single, attached seat cushion and a single, attached back cushion; cushions are rectangular and flush with the frame.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrest with a flat top and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; armrests are straight, broad, and at the same height as the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: Short, blocky legs with a purplish finish, positioned at the corners and slightly inset.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Light beige fabric with a subtle, irregular distressed pattern; no visible tufting or quilting.
